CustomField.description: Attaches the interaction log to this Prospect on particular campaign. If the log is created from the corresponding Prospect page, this field will be auto popualted
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Attaches the interaction log to this Prospect on particular campaign. If the log is created from the corresponding Prospect page, this field will be auto popualted. Please populate only if this is related to a Marketing Campaign Prospect
CustomField.label: Related To Marketing Prospect
